% ============================================================
% Embedded Mastery Tutorial — LaTeX Template for PDF
% Uses only packages available in basic texlive
% ============================================================

\documentclass[11pt,openany,twoside]{book}

% --- Encoding & Font ---
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{microtype}

% --- Unicode box-drawing characters ---
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{251C}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2500}{-}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2514}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2502}{|}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{252C}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2524}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2534}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{253C}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2501}{=}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2503}{|}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{250F}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2513}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2517}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{251B}{+}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2022}{\textbullet}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{00B7}{\textperiodcentered}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{00D7}{\texttimes}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2192}{\textrightarrow}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2190}{\textleftarrow}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{26A0}{!}
\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2139}{i}

% --- Page Layout ---
\usepackage[
  paperwidth=170mm,
  paperheight=240mm,
  top=25mm,
  bottom=25mm,
  inner=25mm,
  outer=20mm,
  headheight=15mm,
  headsep=5mm,
  footskip=12mm
]{geometry}

% --- Colors ---
\usepackage{xcolor}
\definecolor{primarycolor}{HTML}{2563eb}
\definecolor{secondarycolor}{HTML}{1a1a2e}
\definecolor{codebg}{HTML}{f6f8fa}
\definecolor{codeborder}{HTML}{e2e5e9}
\definecolor{tipbg}{HTML}{e8f5e9}
\definecolor{tipborder}{HTML}{a5d6a7}
\definecolor{warningbg}{HTML}{fff8e1}
\definecolor{warningborder}{HTML}{ffe082}
\definecolor{notebg}{HTML}{e3f2fd}
\definecolor{noteborder}{HTML}{90caf9}
\definecolor{linkcolor}{HTML}{2563eb}
\definecolor{tableheader}{HTML}{f0f2f5}
\definecolor{tablestripe}{HTML}{f8f9fa}

% --- Hyperlinks ---
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=primarycolor,
  urlcolor=primarycolor,
  citecolor=primarycolor,
  pdfborder={0 0 0},
  pdfauthor={$for(author)$$author$$sep$, $endfor$},
  pdftitle={$if(title)$$title$$else$Embedded Mastery: C, Ada, Rust \& Zig$endif$},
  pdfsubject={A Project-Based Tutorial for Embedded Development},
  pdfkeywords={embedded, C, Ada, Rust, Zig, tutorial, microcontroller}
}

% --- Headers & Footers ---
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[LE]{\small\textcolor{secondarycolor}{\leftmark}}
\fancyhead[RO]{\small\textcolor{secondarycolor}{\rightmark}}
\fancyfoot[LE,RO]{\small\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.5pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% --- Chapter/Section Styling (no titlesec — use native LaTeX) ---
\makeatletter
\def\@makechapterhead#1{%
  {\parindent \z@ \raggedright \normalfont
    \ifnum \c@secnumdepth >\m@ne
      \huge\bfseries\color{secondarycolor}\@chapapp\space \thechapter
      \par\nobreak
      \vskip 6\p@
    \fi
    \interlinepenalty\@M
    \Huge \bfseries \color{secondarycolor} #1\par\nobreak
    \vskip 20\p@
    \hrule
    \vskip 20\p@
  }}
\def\@makeschapterhead#1{%
  {\parindent \z@ \raggedright \normalfont
    \interlinepenalty\@M
    \Huge \bfseries \color{secondarycolor} #1\par\nobreak
    \vskip 20\p@
    \hrule
    \vskip 20\p@
  }}
\renewcommand{\section}{\@startsection {section}{1}{\z@}%
  {-3.5ex \@plus -1ex \@minus -.2ex}%
  {2.3ex \@plus.2ex}%
  {\normalfont\Large\bfseries\color{secondarycolor}}}
\renewcommand{\subsection}{\@startsection{subsection}{2}{\z@}%
  {-3.25ex\@plus -1ex \@minus -.2ex}%
  {1.5ex \@plus .2ex}%
  {\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{primarycolor}}}
\renewcommand{\subsubsection}{\@startsection{subsubsection}{3}{\z@}%
  {-3.25ex\@plus -1ex \@minus -.2ex}%
  {1.5ex \@plus .2ex}%
  {\normalfont\normalsize\bfseries}}
\makeatother

% --- Code Blocks (pandoc Highlighting + Shaded env) ---
% Simple environments for pandoc code blocks
\definecolor{shadecolor}{HTML}{f6f8fa}
\newenvironment{Shaded}{}{}
\newenvironment{Highlighting}{}{}

% Inline code
\definecolor{inlinecodebg}{HTML}{f0f2f5}
\let\oldtexttt\texttt
\renewcommand{\texttt}[1]{%
  \colorbox{inlinecodebg}{\oldtexttt{\small#1}}%
}

% --- Tables ---
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{colortbl}
\usepackage{calc}
\rowcolors{2}{tablestripe}{white}
\arrayrulecolor{codeborder}

% --- Graphics ---
\usepackage{graphicx}
\graphicspath{{./assets/}}

% --- Lists (no enumitem — use native) ---
% Default list spacing is acceptable

% --- Checkboxes ---
\usepackage{pifont}
\newcommand{\checkbox}{\raisebox{0.5pt}{\textcircled{\raisebox{-0.5pt}{\tiny\phantom{x}}}}}
\newcommand{\checkedbox}{\raisebox{0.5pt}{\textcircled{\raisebox{-0.5pt}{\tiny\ding{51}}}}}

% --- Callout Boxes (simple framed boxes, no tcolorbox) ---
\newenvironment{callouttip}{%
  \par\medskip
  \noindent\colorbox{tipbg}{%
    \parbox{\dimexpr\linewidth-2\fboxsep}{%
      \setlength{\fboxsep}{6pt}%
      \color{tipborder}\rule{\linewidth}{1pt}%
      \par\smallskip
      \textbf{\color{tipborder}Tip}\par\smallskip
      \normalcolor\ignorespaces
    }%
  }%
}{\par\medskip}

\newenvironment{calloutwarning}{%
  \par\medskip
  \noindent\colorbox{warningbg}{%
    \parbox{\dimexpr\linewidth-2\fboxsep}{%
      \setlength{\fboxsep}{6pt}%
      \color{warningborder}\rule{\linewidth}{1pt}%
      \par\smallskip
      \textbf{\color{warningborder}Warning}\par\smallskip
      \normalcolor\ignorespaces
    }%
  }%
}{\par\medskip}

\newenvironment{calloutnote}{%
  \par\medskip
  \noindent\colorbox{notebg}{%
    \parbox{\dimexpr\linewidth-2\fboxsep}{%
      \setlength{\fboxsep}{6pt}%
      \color{noteborder}\rule{\linewidth}{1pt}%
      \par\smallskip
      \textbf{\color{noteborder}Note}\par\smallskip
      \normalcolor\ignorespaces
    }%
  }%
}{\par\medskip}

% --- Math ---
$if(math)$
$math$
$endif$

% --- Line spacing ---
\usepackage{setspace}
\onehalfspacing

% --- Pandoc compatibility ---
\providecommand{\tightlist}{%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}

% --- Header includes ---
$for(header-includes)$
$header-includes$
$endfor$

\begin{document}

% --- Title Page ---
$if(title)$
\begin{titlepage}
  \begin{center}
    \vspace*{2cm}
    {\Huge\bfseries\color{secondarycolor} Embedded Mastery}\\[0.5cm]
    {\Large\color{primarycolor} C \textperiodcentered\ Ada \textperiodcentered\ Rust \textperiodcentered\ Zig}\\[1cm]
    {\large A Project-Based Tutorial}\\[2cm]
    \rule{0.5\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[1cm]
    $if(author)$
    {\large $for(author)$$author$$sep$, $endfor$}\\[0.5cm]
    $endif$
    $if(date)$
    {\normalsize\color{secondarycolor} $date$}
    $endif$
    \vfill
    {\small\color{secondarycolor} 15 Projects \textperiodcentered\ 5 Phases \textperiodcentered\ 4 Languages}
    \vspace{1cm}
  \end{center}
\end{titlepage}
$endif$

% --- Table of Contents ---
\tableofcontents
\clearpage

% --- Content ---
$body$

\end{document}
